childhood.familyBackground: Self-made entrepreneur from modest background. Founded Don Quijote discount retail chain.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 소박한 배경의 자수성가 기업가. Don Quijote 할인 소매 체인 창립.
childhood.earlyLife: Started with small 60 square meter retail store. Pioneered 24/7 discount retail model in Japan.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 60제곱미터 소매점으로 시작. 일본에서 24/7 할인 소매 모델 개척.

careerTimeline.event: Founded Don Quijote starting with 60 square meter retail concept
Opened first Don Quijote store with innovative 24/7 discount retail model
careerTimeline.eventKo: 혁신적인 24/7 할인 소매 모델로 첫 Don Quijote 매장 개점

careerTimeline.event: Expanded Don Quijote across Japan establishing retail dominance
careerTimeline.eventKo: 일본 전역에 Don Quijote 확장, 소매 지배력 확립

careerTimeline.event: Relocated to Singapore to oversee Pan Pacific International Holdings expansion
careerTimeline.eventKo: Pan Pacific International Holdings 확장을 감시하기 위해 싱가포르로 이주

careerTimeline.event: Preparing succession to 24-year-old son Yusaku Yasuda due to terminal lung cancer
careerTimeline.eventKo: 말기 폐암으로 인해 24세 아들 유사쿠 야스다로 경영진권 준비

personalTraits.knownFor: Pioneering 24/7 discount retail model, building Don Quijote empire, retail innovation
personalTraits.knownForKo: 24/7 할인 소매 모델 개척, Don Quijote 제국 구축, 소매 혁신
